title: Section 30
content: Deductions may be made from the pay and allowances of an officer or 1[sailor] in respect of any sentence of fine, forfeiture or mulcts of pay and allowances awarded in pursuance of this Act by a naval tribunal.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 53 of 1974, s. 2, for "seaman" (w.e.f. 16-12-1974).
